requirement_topic.en: UAE Energy-Efficiency Requirements for Lighting (Minimum Efficacy / Performance)
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋照明能效要求（最低能效/性能）
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋照明能效要求（最低能效/性能）

summary.en: The UAE operates a mandatory energy-efficiency regime for lighting administered by the Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating the former ESMA), with technical requirements set in the applicable UAE.S standard (which adopts the relevant GSO Gulf standard and IEC references). The regime sets minimum performance criteria for LED lamps and luminaires placed on the UAE market, which typically include minimum luminous efficacy (lm/W), minimum colour rendering index, rated lifetime/lumen maintenance, and power factor, evaluated against the standard in force. Products that do not meet the minimum criteria cannot be registered under ECAS and cannot clear customs at ports such as Jebel Ali (Dubai) or Khalifa (Abu Dhabi). Exact thresholds depend on lamp/luminaire sub-category and the current UAE.S / GSO edition — verify the specific product type against the standard in force.
summary.zh: 阿联酋对照明实施强制性能效制度，由工业和先进技术部（MoIAT，已并入原 ESMA）管理，技术要求载于适用的 UAE.S 标准（采用相关 GSO 海湾标准及 IEC 引用）。该制度对进入阿联酋市场的 LED 灯及灯具设定最低性能准则，通常包括最低光效（lm/W）、最低显色指数、额定寿命/光通量维持率及功率因数，依据现行标准评估。不满足最低准则的产品无法在 ECAS 下注册，亦无法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清关。确切阈值取决于灯/灯具子类别及现行 UAE.S / GSO 版本——请依据现行标准核查具体产品类型。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋對照明實施強制性能效制度，由工業和先進技術部（MoIAT，已併入原 ESMA）管理，技術要求載於適用的 UAE.S 標準（採用相關 GSO 海灣標準及 IEC 引用）。該制度對進入阿聯酋市場的 LED 燈及燈具設定最低性能準則，通常包括最低光效（lm/W）、最低顯色指數、額定壽命/光通量維持率及功率因數，依據現行標準評估。不滿足最低準則的產品無法在 ECAS 下註冊，亦無法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清關。確切閾值取決於燈/燈具子類別及現行 UAE.S / GSO 版本——請依據現行標準核查具體產品類型。

standards_or_laws: UAE energy-efficiency requirements for lighting (MoIAT/ESMA) — set in the applicable UAE.S standard adopting the relevant GSO Gulf standard and IEC references
Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) — registration and Certificate of Conformity required before market placement

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest): ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2: ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3: ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products; labels are administered by SAMR. GB 30255 does not comprehensively cover power factor, CRI minimums, or lifetime requirements in the same binding way as the UAE lighting energy-efficiency regime.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 级：≥80 lm/W；3 级：≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，标识由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以与阿联酋照明能效制度相同的约束性方式全面涵盖功率因数、最低显色指数或寿命要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 級：≥80 lm/W；3 級：≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）註冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，標識由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以與阿聯酋照明能效制度相同的約束性方式全面涵蓋功率因數、最低顯色指數或壽命要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: The UAE lighting energy-efficiency regime sets minimum performance criteria evaluated against the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard in force, and these criteria are not auto-satisfied by a Chinese GB 30255 grade — a product's CN grade does not determine UAE pass/fail. Chinese Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) products in particular risk failing the UAE minimum efficacy depending on the current threshold for the product sub-category. Beyond efficacy, the UAE regime may bind minimum CRI, lifetime/lumen maintenance, and power factor that GB 30255 does not mandate equivalently across all product types. Manufacturers must verify the product against the current UAE.S / GSO edition and pass conformity assessment under ECAS before registration — there is no mutual recognition with CN CEL. Always confirm exact thresholds for the specific lamp/luminaire sub-category against the standard in force.
gap.zh: 阿联酋照明能效制度依据现行适用的 UAE.S / GSO 标准设定最低性能准则，这些准则不会因中国 GB 30255 等级而自动满足——产品的中国等级不能决定阿联酋的合格与否。尤其是中国 3 级（≥70 lm/W）产品，视产品子类别现行阈值而定，存在无法满足阿联酋最低能效的风险。除能效外，阿联酋制度可能约束最低显色指数、寿命/光通量维持率及功率因数，而 GB 30255 并未对所有产品类型作等效强制。制造商须依据现行 UAE.S / GSO 版本核查产品，并在注册前通过 ECAS 合格评定——与中国 CEL 无互认。请始终依据现行标准确认具体灯/灯具子类别的确切阈值。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋照明能效制度依據現行適用的 UAE.S / GSO 標準設定最低性能準則，這些準則不會因中國 GB 30255 等級而自動滿足——產品的中國等級不能決定阿聯酋的合格與否。尤其是中國 3 級（≥70 lm/W）產品，視產品子類別現行閾值而定，存在無法滿足阿聯酋最低能效的風險。除能效外，阿聯酋制度可能約束最低顯色指數、壽命/光通量維持率及功率因數，而 GB 30255 並未對所有產品類型作等效強制。製造商須依據現行 UAE.S / GSO 版本核查產品，並在註冊前通過 ECAS 合格評定——與中國 CEL 無互認。請始終依據現行標準確認具體燈/燈具子類別的確切閾值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products not meeting the UAE minimum lighting energy-efficiency criteria cannot be registered under ECAS or placed on the UAE market; thresholds set in the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard in force (MoIAT/ESMA)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating former ESMA), UAE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The UAE operates a mandatory lighting energy-efficiency regime administered by MoIAT/ESMA, with minimum efficacy, and commonly CRI, lifetime, and power factor criteria set in the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard in force. Chinese Grade 3 products (≥70 lm/W) may not meet UAE minimums, and the CN CEL grade does not cross-map to UAE conformity. Verify exact thresholds for the specific product sub-category against the current UAE.S / GSO edition, then register under ECAS before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋实施由 MoIAT/ESMA 管理的强制性照明能效制度，最低能效及通常的显色指数、寿命及功率因数准则载于现行适用的 UAE.S / GSO 标准。中国 3 级产品（≥70 lm/W）可能无法满足阿联酋最低要求，且中国 CEL 等级不能与阿联酋合规互换映射。请依据现行 UAE.S / GSO 版本核查具体产品子类别的确切阈值，再在进入市场前于 ECAS 下注册。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋實施由 MoIAT/ESMA 管理的強制性照明能效制度，最低能效及通常的顯色指數、壽命及功率因數準則載於現行適用的 UAE.S / GSO 標準。中國 3 級產品（≥70 lm/W）可能無法滿足阿聯酋最低要求，且中國 CEL 等級不能與阿聯酋合規互換映射。請依據現行 UAE.S / GSO 版本核查具體產品子類別的確切閾值，再在進入市場前於 ECAS 下註冊。

requirement_topic.en: UAE Energy-Efficiency Label for Lighting + ECAS Registration
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋照明能效标签 + ECAS 注册
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋照明能效標籤 + ECAS 註冊

summary.en: The UAE requires regulated lamps and luminaires to carry the UAE energy-efficiency label for lighting and to be registered under the Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) administered by MoIAT (incorporating the former ESMA) before market placement. The energy-efficiency rating is determined from the product's measured performance (e.g., luminous efficacy and related parameters) against the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard, and is shown to consumers via a star-rating or graded label depending on the scheme version in force. Mandatory steps for in-scope products before UAE market entry: (1) test the product against the applicable UAE.S / GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard and determine the rating; (2) obtain an ECAS Certificate of Conformity through an in-country importer/registrant; (3) display the UAE energy-efficiency label on product packaging and the product where required, and ensure the rating is consistent with the certificate. Verify the current label format and scheme scope with MoIAT/ESMA, as the lighting energy label format is updated over time.
summary.zh: 阿联酋要求受管制灯及灯具在上市前贴附阿联酋照明能效标签，并依据由 MoIAT（已并入原 ESMA）管理的阿联酋合格评定计划（ECAS）注册。能效评级根据产品依据适用 UAE.S / GSO 标准实测的性能（如光效及相关参数）确定，并视现行计划版本以星级或等级标签向消费者展示。适用产品进入阿联酋市场前的强制步骤：（1）依据适用的 UAE.S / GSO 照明能效标准检测产品并确定评级；（2）通过在地进口商/注册人取得 ECAS 符合性证书；（3）在产品包装及在有要求时在产品上显示阿联酋能效标签，并确保评级与证书一致。请向 MoIAT/ESMA 核实现行标签格式及计划范围，因照明能效标签格式会随时间更新。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋要求受管制燈及燈具在上市前貼附阿聯酋照明能效標籤，並依據由 MoIAT（已併入原 ESMA）管理的阿聯酋合格評定計劃（ECAS）註冊。能效評級根據產品依據適用 UAE.S / GSO 標準實測的性能（如光效及相關參數）確定，並視現行計劃版本以星級或等級標籤向消費者展示。適用產品進入阿聯酋市場前的強制步驟：（1）依據適用的 UAE.S / GSO 照明能效標準檢測產品並確定評級；（2）通過在地進口商/註冊人取得 ECAS 符合性證書；（3）在產品包裝及在有要求時在產品上顯示阿聯酋能效標籤，並確保評級與證書一致。請向 MoIAT/ESMA 核實現行標籤格式及計劃範圍，因照明能效標籤格式會隨時間更新。

standards_or_laws: UAE energy-efficiency label for lighting (MoIAT/ESMA) — applicable to regulated lamps and luminaires, based on the UAE.S / GSO lighting energy-efficiency standard
Emirates Conformity Assessment Scheme (ECAS) — Certificate of Conformity required before market placement

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with the CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the UAE energy-efficiency labelling/ECAS scheme and the CN CEL registration scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）进行注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。阿联酋能效标签/ECAS 计划与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）進行註冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。阿聯酋能效標籤/ECAS 計劃與中國能效標識註冊方案之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The UAE ECAS registration and the UAE energy-efficiency label are mandatory pre-market steps with no CN equivalent recognition: a product must be certified separately under ECAS for the UAE and registered with CQC/CECP for CN. The UAE label rating is derived against the applicable UAE.S / GSO standard, while the CN CEL grade uses GB 30255 absolute lm/W thresholds — they are not directly comparable, and a product's CN grade does not determine its UAE rating. Both schemes are mandatory but non-mutual. The ECAS certificate must be held by an in-country importer/registrant, and goods cannot clear customs at ports such as Jebel Ali (Dubai) or Khalifa (Abu Dhabi) without it. Confirm the current UAE lighting energy-label format with MoIAT/ESMA before printing packaging artwork for the UAE market.
gap.zh: 阿联酋 ECAS 注册及阿联酋能效标签为强制性上市前步骤，且无中国对应互认：产品须分别在阿联酋于 ECAS 下认证、在中国向 CQC/CECP 注册。阿联酋标签评级依据适用 UAE.S / GSO 标准得出，而中国 CEL 等级采用 GB 30255 绝对 lm/W 阈值——两者不可直接比较，产品的中国等级不能决定其阿联酋评级。两种方案均为强制性但不互认。ECAS 证书须由在地进口商/注册人持有，缺少该证书货物无法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清关。在为阿联酋市场印制包装设计前，请向 MoIAT/ESMA 确认现行阿联酋照明能效标签格式。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋 ECAS 註冊及阿聯酋能效標籤為強制性上市前步驟，且無中國對應互認：產品須分別在阿聯酋於 ECAS 下認證、在中國向 CQC/CECP 註冊。阿聯酋標籤評級依據適用 UAE.S / GSO 標準得出，而中國 CEL 等級採用 GB 30255 絕對 lm/W 閾值——兩者不可直接比較，產品的中國等級不能決定其阿聯酋評級。兩種方案均為強制性但不互認。ECAS 證書須由在地進口商/註冊人持有，缺少該證書貨物無法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清關。在為阿聯酋市場印製包裝設計前，請向 MoIAT/ESMA 確認現行阿聯酋照明能效標籤格式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope lamps/luminaires — UAE energy-efficiency label and ECAS Certificate of Conformity required before UAE market placement (MoIAT/ESMA); the certificate is held by an in-country importer/registrant
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MoIAT, incorporating former ESMA), UAE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The UAE energy-efficiency label for lighting and ECAS registration are mandatory for in-scope lamps and luminaires under MoIAT/ESMA before market placement. Chinese CEL registration does not substitute for ECAS, and the UAE rating and CN CEL grade are calculated differently and cannot be directly cross-mapped. The ECAS certificate must be held by an in-country importer/registrant, and goods cannot clear customs at ports such as Jebel Ali (Dubai) or Khalifa (Abu Dhabi) without it. Confirm the current UAE lighting energy-label format with MoIAT/ESMA before finalising packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿联酋照明能效标签及 ECAS 注册为受管制灯及灯具在 MoIAT/ESMA 下上市前的强制要求。中国 CEL 注册不可替代 ECAS，且阿联酋评级与中国 CEL 等级计算方式不同，不可直接互换映射。ECAS 证书须由在地进口商/注册人持有，缺少该证书货物无法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清关。在最终确定包装前，请向 MoIAT/ESMA 确认现行阿联酋照明能效标签格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿聯酋照明能效標籤及 ECAS 註冊為受管制燈及燈具在 MoIAT/ESMA 下上市前的強制要求。中國 CEL 註冊不可替代 ECAS，且阿聯酋評級與中國 CEL 等級計算方式不同，不可直接互換映射。ECAS 證書須由在地進口商/註冊人持有，缺少該證書貨物無法在 Jebel Ali（迪拜）或 Khalifa（阿布扎比）等口岸清關。在最終確定包裝前，請向 MoIAT/ESMA 確認現行阿聯酋照明能效標籤格式。
